backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (AnalysisResult, UserProfile, UserSettings, etc.) and canister endpoints for storing/retrieving analyses, managing user profiles and settings, with role-based access control via an AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to their implementation files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels for the Results page redesign and chart thumbnail display updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, borders, chart palette, sidebar) used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Advance Signal Pro' that mounts the React app at the `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Dashboard, AnalyzeChart, ProcessingScreen, Results (with `$id` param), History, and Settings, wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using a `useCamera` hook to start/stop/capture/switch camera, displaying Portuguese UI text for all buttons and error messages, and returning the captured photo via an `onCapture` callback.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: A React canvas component that renders a chart image with overlaid support/resistance lines (dashed green/red) and a directional arrow indicating buy or sell signals.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: A file upload component supporting drag-and-drop, click-to-browse, and clipboard paste for images up to 10MB, with a preview of the selected file.
A list item component displaying a historical analysis entry with signal direction, confidence percentage, timestamp, and WIN/LOSS badge.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps page content via an Outlet, includes a Toaster for notifications, and renders a footer with branding.
A UI component showing a single processing step with an animated progress bar, status icon, and percentage, supporting active, complete, and idle states.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A simple layout component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: A card component displaying a trading signal (COMPRA, VENDA, NEUTRO, SEM ENTRADA) with confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional strength indicator.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Empty configuration file, likely a placeholder for API configuration settings.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: A React context provider that manages light/dark theme state, persists it to localStorage, and exposes toggle and set functions via a custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: React hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, returning the captured image and any permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: React hook that counts down from a given number of seconds, returning the formatted time remaining, a finished flag, and raw seconds left.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, and daily operation progress via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings that exposes settings data, loading state, and an updateSettings function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, defines light/dark CSS custom properties, and adds styles for processing bars, range inputs, and touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for selecting or capturing a chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then storing it in sessionStorage and navigating to the processing page.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Displays a paginated list of past chart analyses fetched via `useGetAnalyses`, with loading/empty states and navigation back to home or to the analyze page.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Runs a multi-stage animated processing flow that reads a chart image from sessionStorage, performs local candle analysis, and navigates to the results page upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Shows the full analysis result (signal, trend, confidence, patterns, probabilities, support/resistance) with a countdown timer and win/loss feedback mechanism.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure AI sensitivity, default timeframe, notifications, daily operation limit, and theme, persisting values to both localStorage and the backend.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/services/localCandleAnalysi: Client-side chart analysis service that processes a chart image via pixel scanning to detect bullish/bearish candle columns, support/resistance levels, and generate a trading signal result.
frontend/src/types/analysisTypes.ts: TypeScript interface `LocalAnalysisResult` defining the shape of the client-side candle analysis output, including trend, signal, confidence, patterns, probabilities, and timeframe.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for the external chart analysis API response (`ApiAnalysisResponse`) and errors, with detailed JSDoc describing the required 6-step rule-based analysis process.
frontend/src/utils/dataUrlToFile.ts: Converts a base64 data URL string into a File object, returning null for any invalid, malformed, or non-base64 input without throwing errors.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date/time string (e.g., '5 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Defines the serialisable AnalysisResult interface and maps a LocalAnalysisResult object to it for storage in sessionStorage and use on the Results page.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Shares a formatted Portuguese analysis summary via the Web Share API, falling back to clipboard copy or a textarea execCommand for older browsers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions to read, store, retrieve, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/radius values, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 59) for Advance Signal Pro, documenting architecture, existing features, and known bugs including analysis errors, save failures, and timeframe selector issues.
